gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/121)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/121)
text: كَانَ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) إِذَا لَمْ يَكُنْ لَهُ أُدْمٌ قَطَعَ الْخُبْزَ بِالسِّكِّينِ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Sayyari, from Abu Ali Bin Rashid,

(It has been narrated) raising it from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup>, whenever he<sup>asws</sup> did not have a sauce for him<sup>asws</sup>, cut the bread with the knife’.
en.sarwar: 9. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from al-Sayyariy from abu Ali ibn Rashid in a marfu‘ manner has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that when ’Amir al-Mu’minin did not have curry; he would cut the bread with a knife.’”
